query:
-- Presupuestos (PRES)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'presupuesto', YEAR(NOW()), 
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(quoteNumber, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0), 'PRES'
FROM quotes WHERE quoteNumber LIKE CONCAT('PRE-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Facturas (FAC)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'factura', YEAR(NOW()),
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(invoiceNumber, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0), 'FAC'
FROM invoices WHERE invoiceNumber LIKE CONCAT('FAC-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
  AND invoiceNumber REGEXP '^FAC-[0-9]{4}-[0-9]+$'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Liquidaciones (LIQ)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'liquidacion', YEAR(NOW()),
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(settlementNumber, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0), 'LIQ'
FROM supplier_settlements WHERE settlementNumber LIKE CONCAT('LIQ-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Reservas, TPV, Cupones, Anulaciones
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
VALUES 
  ('reserva', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'RES'),
  ('tpv', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'TPV'),
  ('cupon', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'CUP'),
  ('anulacion', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'ANU')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = current_number;
